regions.text: Here are two bodies. One is a great body. It is the earth. The other is a small body. It is an apple. The apple is coming down to the earth. Why?
It is coming down because there is an attraction between the two bodies. The attraction between them makes the apple come down.
All bodies which have weight have an attraction for one another. Here are two bodies. These are springs. Which body has the greater weight?
Here are two men. This man is thin. His body is thin. This man is fat. His body is fat. Which man's weight is greater?
